Title: Bleach linkify(parse_email=True) CPU exhaustion via unbounded email regex scanning
Description: Bleach 6.3.0 exposes a documented email-linkification path through `bleach.linkify(..., parse_email=True)`. The implementation scans attacker-controlled text with `EMAIL_RE.finditer()` over the full character token and has no length, timeout, or linear prefilter before applying the dot-atom email regex. A non-email payload around 30 KB causes multi-second CPU consumption per request/call, creating a direct availability risk for applications that enable email linkification on user-submitted text.
Solution: Unfortunately, there is no solution available yet.
